sub_modules.bpf_sample_window: Combinationally forms the causal FIR tap window from the current sample and registered history.
sub_modules.bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 signed Q15 band-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_product: Combinational signed multiplier for one sample and one coefficient.
sub_modules.bpf_accumulator: Combinational signed 64-bit accumulator for all tap products.
sub_modules.bpf_q15_normalizer: Combinational arithmetic Q15 normalization and output-width truncation.
